tasks.label: build active file (auto gcc/g++)
args: f='${file}'; out='${fileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}'; case "$f" in *.c) /usr/local/bin/gcc -std=c17 -Wall -Wextra -g "$f" -o "$out" ;; *.cpp|*.cc|*.cxx|*.CPP|*.C) /usr/local/bin/g++ -std=c++20 -Wall -Wextra -g "$f" -o "$out" ;; *) echo "Unsupported file extension: $f"; exit 1 ;; esac
